This is an LSM k/v database implementation in Go. The code follows standard Go conventions and best practices for readability, maintainability, and performance. 

## Contribution Guidelines
When contributing to this codebase, please adhere to the following guidelines:
- Use clear and descriptive variable and function names.
- Follow the Go naming conventions (e.g., use camelCase for variables, PascalCase for types).
- Write idiomatic Go code.
- Ensure all code is properly formatted and indented.
- Include comprehensive comments for complex logic.
- Write unit tests for new functionality.
- Keep changes focused and minimal.

## Key Features
Refer to the README.md file for a detailed overview of the key features of this LSM k/v database implementation.
